The New Era of Luxury Travel

Experience the Difference

Value Without Compromise

Our travel designers curate exquisite travel itineraries that have been hand-crafted just for you. We focus on respect, service, and quality while keeping your interests at the heart of every vacation experience.

~Welcome to Luxera Travel~

RESPECT

SERVICE

QUALITY

Luxury Beyond Compare

Our Story

At Luxera Travel, we have an undeniable passion for travel and a strong desire to share that passion with others. Our team’s exceptional industry service record is a true testament to that; however, we have taken our love of travel and our desire to serve to the next level.

In a world where cookie-cutter vacations and diminished service quality have become the norm, Luxera Travel was created to introduce clients to “The New Era of Luxury Travel,” where the vacation experience is tailored to you!

Our travel designers do more than simply manage travel arrangements. They deliver elevated, enlightened, and authentic vacations that enrich the lives of each of our clients. We do this by providing a client-centric planning experience to pair you with hand-selected travel partners whose brands provide the same quality, respect, and service you receive at Luxera Travel.

Get Started
LUXURY REDESIGNED

Luxury of Today


Luxury travel means something different for each person.
For us, it is more than just a vacation — it’s about living!

We strive to provide the best of the best; intimate experiences, personalized services, gourmet meals, stunning surroundings, and unique encounters. It is about insider access, enhanced accommodations, and fulfilling all of your physical, emotional, and intellectual needs.

Our team provides a complimentary consultation to each of our clients to ensure we are the perfect fit for their vacation. During this consultation, we get to know you, your must-haves, and your unique travel preferences in order to curate the perfect vacation experience.

Whether you are traveling for business or pleasure, solitude or reconnection, relaxation or excitement, our dedicated and passionate specialists are ready to inspire you from the moment your vacation planning begins.
